As soon as this message was read in the House of Lords, it was moved, that an humble address be presented to his Majesty, to return him thanks for his most gracious message, and to assure him, that the House would im- mediately proceed to the consi- deration of the means of complying with his Majes- ty's most gracious desire. Upon this occasion many Lords spoke, and expressed their entire satisfaction at the honour, the dignity, and
